docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCALZI, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT APFELSTAEDT, PETER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 189 RUSS STREET, (ROOM @ END OF HALL, OFF THE KITCHEN), SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCALZI, MICHAEL SERVED APR-28-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT APFELSTAEDT, PETER
